The '''''Kathol Protector''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] in service to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] as part of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|military forces]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. Modified to mount two [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam projectors]] in place of two of the standard escort carrier's complement of ten twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], the ship also carried [[Pathogenic bomb|pathogenic weapons]] as part of its arsenal. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberated]] the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. In response, the population of the nearby [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kolatill]] overthrew their Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] and declared their allegiance to the New Republic. The ''Kathol Protector'' conducted a [[Bombing of Domaz|retaliatory strike]] on the world, using [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] to severely damage the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Domaz]].

Several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, the ''Kathol Protector'' returned to the planet to conduct a second attack, this time using the pathogenic weapons it carried. The New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' had responded to a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] from Kolatill and was in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet. During the ensuing [[Battle of Kolatill|battle]], the ''Kathol Protector''{{'s}} TIE [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] were tasked with releasing their pathogenic bombs on urban areas across the planet. They were eventually stopped by the combined [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] forces of the ''FarStar'' and the [[Kolatill Defense Force]]. Despite this, the ''Kathol Protector'' was able to capture a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carrying [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keleman Ciro]]—the [[Commander/Legends|commanding officer]] of the ''FarStar''—before withdrawing from the battle.

==Description==
[[File:EscortCarrier-Rebellion.png|thumb|left|An escort carrier, the same class as the ''Kathol Protector'']]
The ''Kathol Protector'' was a lightly-modified<ref name="Omens" /> [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]], measuring five hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] from bow to stern. It was fitted with a Class One [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], supplemented by a Class Twelve backup unit. The ''Kathol Protector'' carried nine [[Standard month/Legends|months]] worth of consumables, allowing it to operate away from its home base for a considerable amount of time, and had a cargo storage capacity of five hundred [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was normally manned by 3,505 crewmembers—which included twenty [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]]—but could be crewed by 1,500 beings if the need arose. 800 [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] could also be transported by the ship.<ref name="Imperial Sourcebook" /> The ''Kathol Protector''{{'s}} armament was slightly modified; it had only eight twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] instead of ten, as two of its emplacements were replaced with [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam projectors]]. The ''Kathol Protector''{{'s}} [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] consisted of six [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], divided into two squadrons of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] and four squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE starfighters]]. In addition to mounting normal weaponry, the starfighter wing also had [[pathogenic bomb]]s available to it.<ref name="Omens" />

==History==
The ''Kathol Protector'' served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was later part of the [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], an Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who ruled the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] from [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. In 8 ABY, following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]], the ''Kathol Protector'' [[Bombing of Domaz|assaulted]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kolatill]]. Kolatill's population had staged an uprising in the wake of Kal'Shebbol's fall, overthrowing the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]], [[Tetrum]], and declaring their allegiance to the New Republic. The ''Kathol Protector'' arrived in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Kolatill, and launched TIE bombers toward the planet. The [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] targeted the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Domaz]], devastating much of the city and leaving it burning. After recalling its fighters, the ''Kathol Protector'' exited the [[Kolatill system/Legends|system]].<ref name="Omens" />

Several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, the ''Kathol Protector'' returned to Kolatill, intending to launch a second strike against the planet. This time, the TIE bombers were armed with pathogenic bombs, and had been ordered to strike at several urban areas around the planet, rather than just the capital. However, following the bombing of Domaz, the [[Kolatill Council]]—the planet's ruling body—had sent out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] aimed at the New Republic forces present at Kal'Shebbol. The [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' had responded and was in the process of rendering assistance. Relief teams being guarded by half of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[FarStar starfighter squadron|starfighter squadron]] were on the ground, and a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was carrying the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette's]] [[Commander/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keleman Ciro]], between the ship and the planet for a meeting with the Kolatill Council.<ref name="Omens" />

The ''Kathol Protector'' deployed its entire starfighter force, splitting its TIE starfighters between the ''FarStar'' and her remaining starfighters and Captain Ciro's shuttle, while the TIE bombers headed toward the planet. During the [[Battle of Kolatill|battle]], the ''FarStar''—under the command of [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]]—and its fighter screen fought a holding action against three squadrons of TIE starfighters. The fourth squadron of TIE starfighters harried Captain Ciro's shuttle, herding it toward the ''Kathol Protector''. Once the shuttle was in range, the escort carrier's tractor beam projectors ensnared the vessel, drawing it into its hangar.<ref name="Omens" />

[[File:Noell_Ciro_death.jpg|thumb|right|Noell Ciro's fighter rams the last TIE bomber during the Battle of Kolatill.]]
In Kolatill's atmosphere, the ''Kathol Protector''{{'s}} TIE bombers were intercepted by the starfighters assigned to guard the relief shuttles from the ''FarStar'', alongside TIE starfighters from the [[Kolatill Defense Force]]. During the [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfight]], a New Republic fighter destroyed the first bomber. The starfighter's sensors detected a small concentration of highly toxic poison in the immediate area of the explosion, revealing the presence of pathogenic weapons in the bomber's payloads. Increasing their efforts to prevent a disaster, Kolatill's defenders eliminated every bomber. The last ship was destroyed by [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Noell Ciro]], younger brother of Captain Keleman Ciro. In an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] that had suffered damage—resulting in the loss of its weapons—Ciro rammed the last bomber, destroying it and [[Death/Legends|killing]] himself in the process.<ref name="Omens" />

With its primary mission a failure, the ''Kathol Protector'' recalled its remaining fighters and withdrew from the system.<ref name="Omens" /> The ship later rendezvoused with elements of Sarne's forces to transfer Captain Ciro into their custody. Ciro was taken for interrogation at the [[Q'Maere Research Facility]] in the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]].<ref name="Harm's Way">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Harm's Way|book=The Kathol Rift}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Kathol Protector'' was created for the roleplaying adventure ''[[Omens]]'', which was published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' by [[West End Games]]. It serves as a plot point in the adventure for the capture of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} commanding officer, Keleman Ciro. This in turn elevates Kaiya Adrimetrum, the First Officer, to the position of commanding officer. Unlike most other roleplaying adventures, where the situations can be adapted to suit the needs of the players and the gamemaster, the capture of Ciro is mandated by the adventure, as the rest of the [[The DarkStryder Campaign (series)|campaign]] continues with the assumption that Adrimetrum is the commander of the ''FarStar''.
